entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Debatteer oor ambitie met Steve Jobs"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Debatteer oor klimaatbeleid met Greta Thunberg"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Debatteer oor geregtigheid met Batman"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Debate with a personality op inspir vir leer argumenteren, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argument

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Kies 'n persoonlikheid.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Debatteer met 'n persoonlikheid

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate With A Personality Using AI is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: noem 'n regte of fictieve persoonlikheid en debatteer met diegene oor elke onderwerp. Die AI toegang verkry tot hulle openbare styl en wereldbeeld terwyl wat debat eerlik bly.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Debate With A Personality Using AI: praktiese gids

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Leerders wat lewendige debatsoefening met onvergeetlike stemme en regverdige uitdagings wil hê.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Oefen weerleggingen.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Kies 'n onderwerp.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Debate with a personality. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Debate any topic. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Die debat gebruik openbare styl en wêreldbeskouing sonder om voor te gee dat dit private oortuigings ken.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Debate with a personality wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
